sections.paragraph: m., an abomination, something abominable; used of impure things (garments), Nah 3:6 of flesh of victims, εἰδωλοθύτα, Zec 9:7.; especially of idols. 1Ki 11:5, “Milcom שׁ׳ עַמֹּנִים the idol of the Ammonites.” 2Ki 23:13 Dan 9:27 comp. Dan 11:31 12:11 . Plur. idols, 2Ki 23:24 Eze 20:7, Eze 20:8.
